description: Use this API to place machines in a specified subsystem on- or off-line to satisfy a given subsystem minimum capacity; the in-service machines in the subsystem are then dispatched on the basis of incremental cost to meet a specified total subsystem generation (activity ECDI). This API must be referenced using one of the following procedures: - One reference with APIOPT=1, followed by one reference with APIOPT=2, followed by one or more references with APIOPT=3, followed by one reference with APIOPT=4. - One reference with APIOPT=0. This automatically combines the processing of one APIOPT 1 reference, followed by one APIOPT 2 reference, followed by one APIOPT 3 reference, followed by one APIOPT 4 reference. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = ecdi(sid, all, apiopt, cfile, status, values)
python_syntax: ierr = ecdi(sid, all, apiopt, cfile, status, values)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; used only when APIOPT is 0 or 2; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; used only when APIOPT is 0 or 2; 1 by default).

parameters.name: apiopt
parameters.description: Mode of operation of the api. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: cfile
parameters.description: Name of the economic dispatch data file (when apiopt is 0 or 1). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Unit commitment option. (input; used only when APIOPT is 0 or 2; 0 by default).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying (used only when APIOPT is 0 or 3). (input).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

apiopt.description: initialize, specify subsystem, process, and clean up.

status.description: new commitment profile (start with all units off-line).

values.description: desired minimum capacity of units being dispatched (0 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
dispatch unable to meet desired power and capacity.
no dispatch data for any subsystem machines.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
